---
title: "SPH5104_Analysis"
author: "Hao, Sicheng"
date: "2026-03-30"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(gdata)
library(lubridate)
library(comorbidity)
library(table1)
library(bigrquery)
library(DBI)
library(dbplyr)
library(dplyr)
library(broom)
library(patchwork)
library(writexl)

library(MatchIt)
##

project_id <- "mimic-hr"

bq_auth()

mimic_iv_sql <- "
select * from `mimic-hr.derived.cancer_cohort_mv` 
"
mimic_iv_job <- bq_project_query(
  x = project_id,
  query = mimic_iv_sql,
  use_legacy_sql = FALSE
)

cancer_cohort <- bq_table_download(mimic_iv_job)
```


### Download Additional Data
```{r}

mimic_iv_sql <- "
select * from `mimic-hr.hourly.icu_hourly`  
where stay_id in (select stay_id from `mimic-hr.derived.cancer_cohort_mv` )
"
mimic_iv_job <- bq_project_query(
  x = project_id,
  query = mimic_iv_sql,
  use_legacy_sql = FALSE
)

hourly_data <- bq_table_download(mimic_iv_job)

mimic_iv_sql <- "
select * from `mimic-hr.hourly.icu_hourly`  
where stay_id in (select stay_id from `mimic-hr.derived.cancer_cohort_mv` )
"
mimic_iv_job <- bq_project_query(
  x = project_id,
  query = mimic_iv_sql,
  use_legacy_sql = FALSE
)


# 2. DEMOGRAPHICS (admissions + age + gender)

sql <- "
SELECT subject_id, hadm_id, insurance, language, race, marital_status, hospital_expire_flag
FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.admissions`
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
mimic_demographic = bq_table_download(bq_data)

sql <- "SELECT hadm_id, age FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_derived.age`"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
mimic_age = bq_table_download(bq_data)

sql <- "SELECT subject_id, gender FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.patients`"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
mimic_gender = bq_table_download(bq_data)


# 3. ICU STAYS — identify first ICU stay per patient

sql <- "
select icu.* ,adm.admission_location,adm.discharge_location,hospital_expire_flag,gender,insurance,pt.dod,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY icu.hadm_id ORDER BY icu.intime) AS row_number
from `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.icustays` icu
left join `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.admissions` adm
on adm.hadm_id = icu.hadm_id
and adm.subject_id = icu.subject_id
left join `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.patients` pt
on adm.subject_id = pt.subject_id
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
all_icus = bq_table_download(bq_data)
nrow(all_icus)

first_icu = all_icus%>%filter(row_number==1)
first_icu = first_icu%>%
  group_by(subject_id)%>%
  arrange(intime)%>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup()

mimic_demographic = left_join(mimic_demographic,mimic_age)
mimic_demographic = left_join(mimic_demographic,mimic_gender)


# 4. ICU-SPECIFIC MORTALITY (death within 6h of ICU discharge)

sql <- "
SELECT icu.*,adm.deathtime
, CASE when adm.deathtime <= icu.outtime + interval 6 hour then 1 else 0 end as icu_death_flag
FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.icustays` icu
LEFT JOIN `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_hosp.admissions` adm
ON icu.hadm_id = adm.hadm_id
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
mimic_icu = bq_table_download(bq_data)

mimic_icu = left_join(mimic_icu,mimic_demographic)
mimic_first_icu = mimic_icu%>%filter(stay_id%in%first_icu$stay_id)

# 5. Cancer patients

sql <- "
select * from `mimic-hr.derived.pivoted_cancer` 
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
mimic_cancer = bq_table_download(bq_data)

mimic_cancer = mimic_cancer%>%filter(has_cancer == 1)

first_icu_cancer = left_join(mimic_cancer,mimic_first_icu)
first_icu_cancer = first_icu_cancer%>%filter(!is.na(stay_id))

# 6. Cancer patients

sql <- "
select * from `mimic-hr.derived.pivoted_cancer` 
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
mimic_cancer = bq_table_download(bq_data)

mimic_cancer = mimic_cancer%>%filter(has_cancer == 1)
mimic_cancer_cohort = mimic_first_icu%>%filter(hadm_id%in%mimic_cancer$hadm_id)
```

### Adding Covariates
```{r,echo = F}
sql <- "SELECT * FROM `mimic-hr.derived.sofa2`"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
sofa2_mimic = bq_table_download(bq_data)

sofa2_cohort = sofa2_mimic%>%
  filter(stay_id%in%mimic_cancer_cohort$stay_id)%>%
  filter(hr < 48)

### DNI
sql <- "
SELECT stay_id, value,itemid,charttime
FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_icu.chartevents`
WHERE (value LIKE '%DNI (do not intubate)%' AND itemid = 223758) 
OR (value LIKE '%DNR / DNI%' AND itemid = 223758) 
OR (value LIKE 'Comfort measures only' AND itemid = 223758)
OR (value LIKE '%DNI (do not intubate)%' AND itemid = 228687) 
OR (value LIKE '%DNAR (Do Not Attempt Resuscitation) [DNR] / DNI%' AND itemid = 228687)
OR (value LIKE 'Comfort measures only' AND itemid = 228687)
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
dni = bq_table_download(bq_data)


sql <- "SELECT * FROM `mimic-hr.derived.bg` "
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
blood_gas = bq_table_download(bq_data)
blood_gas = blood_gas%>%
  filter(hadm_id%in%mimic_cancer_cohort$hadm_id)

mimic_cancer_cohort = left_join(mimic_cancer_cohort,cohort)
```


### Selection Criteria

Already did:
First ICU admission of all patients,n = 65366
Cancer patient's first ICU admission, n = 5270
```{r}
### Inclusion, need oxygenation on the first day

cohort <- mimic_cancer_cohort %>%
  mutate(
    intime = as.POSIXct(intime, tz = "UTC"),
    starttime = as.POSIXct(starttime, tz = "UTC"),
    deathtime = as.POSIXct(deathtime, tz = "UTC"),
    time_diff_hours = as.numeric(difftime(starttime, intime, units = "hours")),
    death_days_from_intime = as.numeric(difftime(deathtime, intime, units = "days")),
    `28-day mortality` = if_else(
      !is.na(deathtime) &
        death_days_from_intime >= 0 &
        death_days_from_intime <= 28,
      1L, 0L
    )
  )

### Exclude arrive at ICU ventilated 1 hours before arrive
cohort = cohort%>%filter(time_diff_hours>-1&time_diff_hours<24)### 1512 ### Define require ventilated patient as immediately ventilated and ventilated slightly before ICU admission and also ventilated very soon. 

cohort = left_join(cohort,mimic_cancer%>%select(hadm_id,group_solid,group_hematological,group_metastasized))
```

### Add Covariests


### SOFA related
```{r,echo = FALSE}
## Create binary ventilation label:
## 0 = HFNC/NonInvasiveVent, 1 = Tracheostomy/InvasiveVent; remove None
resp_support_col <- c("ventilation_status")

if (!is.na(resp_support_col)) {
  cohort <- cohort %>%
    mutate(
      vent_label = case_when(
        .data[[resp_support_col]] %in% c("HFNC", "NonInvasiveVent") ~ 0L,
        .data[[resp_support_col]] %in% c("Tracheostomy", "InvasiveVent") ~ 1L,
        TRUE ~ NA_integer_
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(.data[[resp_support_col]] != "None") %>%
    filter(!is.na(vent_label))
}

## Add SOFA-related covariates from first 6 ICU hours (max value, ignore NA)
sofa_vars <- c(
  "rate_epinephrine", "rate_norepinephrine", "rate_dopamine",
  "rate_dobutamine", "rate_milrinone", "rate_vasopressin",
  "rate_phenylephrine", "meanbp_min", "gcs_min", "gcs_motor_min",
   "uomlkghr_6hr", "bilirubin_max",
  "creatinine_max", "platelet_min", "dialysis_present", "dialysis_active",
  "ph", "bicarbonate", "potassium", "delirium_drug_rate", "respiration",
  "coagulation", "liver", "cardiovascular", "cns", "renal","sofa_24hours"
)

available_sofa_vars <- intersect(sofa_vars, names(sofa2_cohort))

agg_by_name <- function(x, var_name) {
  if (all(is.na(x))) return(NA_real_)
  if (grepl("min", var_name, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    return(min(x, na.rm = TRUE))
  }
  return(max(x, na.rm = TRUE))
}

sofa6_max <- sofa2_cohort %>%
  filter(hr <= 6) %>%
  group_by(stay_id) %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(available_sofa_vars),
      ~ agg_by_name(.x, cur_column())
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

n_cohort_before_join <- nrow(cohort)
cohort <- cohort %>% left_join(sofa6_max, by = "stay_id")
stopifnot(nrow(cohort) == n_cohort_before_join)

## Rename SOFA component variables and replace NA with 0
sofa_component_vars <- c(
  "respiration", "coagulation", "liver", "cardiovascular", "cns", "renal"
)
sofa_component_vars <- intersect(sofa_component_vars, names(cohort))

if (length(sofa_component_vars) > 0) {
  cohort <- cohort %>%
    rename_with(~ paste0("SOFA_", .x), all_of(sofa_component_vars)) %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(paste0("SOFA_", sofa_component_vars)), ~ replace_na(.x, 0)))
}

## Combine vasoactive infusion rates into binary pressor indicator
pressor_vars <- c(
  "rate_epinephrine", "rate_norepinephrine", "rate_dopamine",
  "rate_dobutamine", "rate_milrinone", "rate_vasopressin",
  "rate_phenylephrine"
)
available_pressor_vars <- intersect(pressor_vars, names(cohort))

if (length(available_pressor_vars) > 0) {
  cohort <- cohort %>%
    mutate(
      pressor = as.integer(
        rowSums(!is.na(across(all_of(available_pressor_vars)))) > 0
      )
    )
}


```


### Other
```{r,echo = F}
sql <- "SELECT * FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_derived.bg` 
where specimen = 'ART.'
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
blood_gas = bq_table_download(bq_data)

bg_vars <- c(
  "so2", "po2", "pco2", "fio2", "bicarbonate", "totalco2",
  "hematocrit", "hemoglobin", "carboxyhemoglobin", "methemoglobin",
  "chloride", "calcium", "temperature", "potassium",
  "sodium", "lactate", "glucose"
)
available_bg_vars <- intersect(bg_vars, names(blood_gas))

bg_join_key <- intersect(c("stay_id", "hadm_id", "subject_id"), names(blood_gas))
bg_join_key <- bg_join_key[bg_join_key %in% names(cohort)][1]
if (is.na(bg_join_key)) {
  stop("No common join key between blood_gas and cohort (tried stay_id, hadm_id, subject_id).")
}

cohort_intime <- cohort %>%
  select(stay_id, all_of(bg_join_key), intime) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  mutate(intime = as.POSIXct(intime, tz = "UTC"))

blood_gas_last_preicu <- blood_gas %>%
  mutate(charttime = as.POSIXct(charttime, tz = "UTC")) %>%
  inner_join(cohort_intime, by = bg_join_key) %>%
  filter(!is.na(charttime), !is.na(intime), charttime <= intime) %>%
  group_by(stay_id) %>%
  arrange(charttime) %>%
  slice_tail(n = 1) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(stay_id, all_of(available_bg_vars))

n_cohort_before_bg_join <- nrow(cohort)
cohort <- cohort %>%
  left_join(blood_gas_last_preicu, by = "stay_id", suffix = c("", "_bg"))
stopifnot(nrow(cohort) == n_cohort_before_bg_join)


sql <- "SELECT * FROM `physionet-data.mimiciv_3_1_derived.sapsii` 
"
bq_data <- bq_project_query(project_id, query = sql)
sapsii = bq_table_download(bq_data)

cohort = left_join(cohort,sapsii%>%select(stay_id,sapsii))

```




```{r,echo = FALSE}
fwrite(cohort, file = "sph5104gp.csv")

```

### Table 1
```{r,echo = F}
table1_data <- cohort %>%
  mutate(
    race_group = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(coalesce(race, "")), "^WHITE") ~ "WHITE",
      str_detect(str_to_upper(coalesce(race, "")), "^BLACK") ~ "BLACK",
      str_detect(str_to_upper(coalesce(race, "")), "^ASIAN") ~ "ASIAN",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    language_group = case_when(
      str_to_upper(coalesce(language, "")) == "ENGLISH" ~ "English",
      TRUE ~ "Non-English"
    ),
    insurance_group = case_when(
      str_detect(str_to_upper(coalesce(insurance, "")), "MEDICARE|MEDICAID|MEDICATE") ~ "Medicare/Medicaid",
      str_to_upper(coalesce(insurance, "")) == "PRIVATE" ~ "Private",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    vent_label = factor(
      vent_label,
      levels = c(0, 1),
      labels = c("HFNC/NonInvasiveVent", "Tracheostomy/InvasiveVent")
    ),
    `28-day mortality` = factor(`28-day mortality`, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    hospital_expire_flag = factor(hospital_expire_flag, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    marital_status = as.factor(marital_status),
    dialysis_active = as.factor(dialysis_active),
    pressor = as.factor(pressor),
    race_group = factor(race_group, levels = c("WHITE", "BLACK", "ASIAN", "Other")),
    language_group = factor(language_group, levels = c("English", "Non-English")),
    insurance_group = factor(insurance_group, levels = c("Medicare/Medicaid", "Private", "Other"))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(vent_label))

vars_1a_req <- c(
  "28-day mortality", "hospital_expire_flag", "age", "sofa_24hours", "sapsii",
  "race_group", "language_group", "insurance_group", "marital_status"
)
vars_1b_req <- c(
  "meanbp_min", "gcs_min", "bilirubin_max", "creatinine_max", "platelet_min",
  "dialysis_active", "ph", "bicarbonate", "potassium",
  "so2", "po2", "pco2", "fio2", "totalco2", "hematocrit", "hemoglobin",
  "carboxyhemoglobin", "methemoglobin", "chloride", "calcium",
  "temperature", "sodium", "lactate", "glucose", "sapsii", "pressor"
)
vars_1a <- intersect(vars_1a_req, names(table1_data))
vars_1b <- intersect(vars_1b_req, names(table1_data))

if (length(vars_1a) == 0) stop("No variables from table 1a were found in table1_data.")
if (length(vars_1b) == 0) stop("No variables from table 1b were found in table1_data.")

make_table1_formula <- function(vars, strata) {
  as.formula(paste("~", paste(sprintf("`%s`", vars), collapse = " + "), "|", strata))
}

tab_1a <- table1::table1(make_table1_formula(vars_1a, "vent_label"), data = table1_data)
tab_1b <- table1::table1(make_table1_formula(vars_1b, "vent_label"), data = table1_data)

cat("Table 1a\n")
tab_1a
cat("\nTable 1b\n")
tab_1b

table1_to_df <- function(tab_obj) {
  xml2::read_html(as.character(tab_obj)) %>%
    rvest::html_element("table") %>%
    rvest::html_table(fill = TRUE)
}

tab_1a_df <- table1_to_df(tab_1a)
tab_1b_df <- table1_to_df(tab_1b)

writexl::write_xlsx(tab_1a_df, path = "table-1a.xlsx")
writexl::write_xlsx(tab_1b_df, path = "table-1b.xlsx")


```
